channel.title: documentation on The Blog of Dr. Moron
channel.description: Recent content in documentation on The Blog of Dr. Moron

item.title: Easy Sphinx Extensions with Nested Parsing
item.author: morelandsnl@gmail.com (Kenneth Moreland)
item.description: I’ve recently started the process of converting some software documentation that was originally written for LaTeX and converting it to a newer documentation system called Sphinx. I like the LaTeX implementation much, but the Sphinx documentation provides some important advantages. First, Sphinx is designed to provide html output that will be easier for users to find and reference (while also providing pdf files similar to LaTeX). Second, with the Breathe extension, Sphinx can pull documentation directly from source code.
